title: Serena and Cordell together during Love Island reunion?
description:
Love Island USA’s Season 6 reunion special is scheduled to air on Monday, August 19 at 9 PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Serena and Cordell are confirmed to still be in a romantic relationship at the end of the Love Island USA Season 6 reunion episode. 

"Together" is defined as both Serena and Cordell explicitly stating, or it being clearly indicated during the reunion, that they are still in a romantic relationship.

The resolution source will be the Love Island USA Season 6 reunion episode as aired on Peacock.

title: Who will win the Beast Games?
description:
This market will resolve according to the contestant who is announced as the winner of Beast Games.

The primary resolution source will be the final episode of the Beast Games, however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

title: #1 Searched TV Show on Google this year?
description:
This market will resolve according to the television show ranked #1 in Google’s official Year in Search list for 2025, published on Google’s Year in Search hub.

The authoritative location is trends.withgoogle.com/year-in-search (navigate: Global → Entertainment → TV Shows), where the 2025 page will appear once released (as the 2024 page currently shows the Global “TV Shows” ranking).

If a search term clearly refers to the term listed by Google (for example, through season specification), it will count toward that listed term.

This market may resolve as soon as the official 2025 data is released for the specified timeframe. If none of the listed options is ranked #1 in the respective list or if Google does not release the 2025 Year in Search by March 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other.”

title: Who will win the Beast Games: Season 2?
description:

The winner is defined as the contestant who is announced as the winner. If multiple players are announced as the winner, this market will resolve according to the contestant who wins the most prize money in the final episode. If multiple players tie for most prize money this money will resolve according to the winning contestant whose listed number is highest. 

If no winner is announced by March 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”. 

The primary resolution source will be the final episode of the Beast Games, however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.
